name: zoneBalance
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.zones.every(z => typeof z.zone === 'string' && Number.isFinite(z.current) && Number.isFinite(z.target) && Number.isFinite(z.deviation))
_note: Pure compute, reads artifact.data.zones (ManualJCalc sends [{name, currentTemp:number, targetTemp:number}]). Per zone: deviation = round(|current-target|,1); maxDeviation/avgDeviation across zones; verdict balanced (<3) / minor imbalance (<=5) / imbalanced; balanceScore = max(0, 100 - maxDev*10); recommendation = recommendations[0]. Empty zones → safe empty-shape ({zones:[], verdict:'no zones', balanceScore:100, recommendation:'Add zones…'}) so the card still renders, never a crash. Fail-CLOSED numerics: temps coerce via Number()+Number.isFinite, poisoned 'Infinity'/'NaN'/'abc' fall to 72°F default so deviation stays finite. Result card renders zones[].{zone,current,target,deviation}/maxDeviation/avgDeviation/verdict/balanceScore/recommendation EXACTLY (the prior balanced(bool)/worstZone/recommendations[] were not what the card read — fixed 2026-06-28; retained as aliases).
